LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KENNETH WALTER'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR TO BE RENOTICED IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558.
ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A)

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-08-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS CONDITIONALLY SET FOR 02/21/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 02/10/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. REQUESTED X-RAY FILMS TO BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT BY NOVEMBER 16, 2005 AND FILMS TO BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BY DECEMBER 30, 2005. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT WITHIN 45 DAYS AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: DLOK/JROQUE; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280
